meta.title: America is still ALL-IN on new stealth fighter engines  #usdefensenews #militaryaircraft #military
meta.description:
The US Air Force's new stealth fighter may still be on hold, but the effort to field advanced new engines to power them just received a significant boost in funding. 

Stay on top of Defense Tech news by subscribing to Sandboxx!

Citations:
https://www.defense.gov/News/Contracts/Contract/Article/4042540/
https://www.sandboxx.us/news/the-race-to-field-the-most-advanced-stealth-fighter-engines-in-the-world/
